V-M-075.scope: Premium user cabinet verification for first-screen density, VPN config, MTProto, subscription, devices, referrals, settings, and deletion audit.

success-scenarios.scenario-1: VPN config and subscription actions are reachable within one or two taps on phone.
success-scenarios.scenario-2: MTProto owner-only actions remain visible, compact, and redacted from logs.
success-scenarios.scenario-3: Deletion audit removes bulky duplicate UI without losing workflows.

failure-scenarios.failure-1: Premium layout hides QR/download/copy, trial countdown, tariff state, or device controls.
failure-scenarios.failure-2: Critical values become clipped or hidden behind decorative Matrix surfaces.
